hooks.command: bash -c 'r="$PWD"; while [ "$r" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$r/.bonsai.yaml" ]; do r=$(dirname "$r"); done; bash "$r/station/agent/Sensors/scope-guard-files.sh" "$r"'

bash -c 'r="$PWD"; while [ "$r" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$r/.bonsai.yaml" ]; do r=$(dirname "$r"); done; bash "$r/station/agent/Sensors/status-bar.sh" "$r"'
